invoice_split_rule_inferred: For HVDC-like values, populate HVDC CODE 1..4 from the first four hyphen-separated tokens. If token 4 is purely numeric, Excel-style numeric value is acceptable. Do not overwrite service/location label rows or blank-after-N/A rows.
